# zillizcloud_endpoint_services (Data Source)

List available private link endpoint services for a region.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "zillizcloud_endpoint_services" "this" {
  region_id = "aws-us-west-2"
}

output "available_services" {
  value = data.zillizcloud_endpoint_services.this.endpoint_services[0].endpoint_service
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `region_id` (String) Cloud region ID.

### Optional

- `current_page` (Number) Page number (defaults to 1).
- `page_size` (Number) Page size (1-100, defaults to 10).

### Read-Only

- `endpoint_services` (Attributes List) List of endpoint services. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--endpoint_services))
- `total_count` (Number) Total count of endpoint services.

<a id="nestedatt--endpoint_services"></a>
### Nested Schema for `endpoint_services`

Read-Only:

- `cloud_id` (String)
- `endpoint_service` (String)
- `region_id` (String)
- `whitelist_required` (Boolean)
